spec.description: A dashboard to show information relevant to the ROCm(tm) AMD Infinity Context System using for KV Cache block management and prefill offload via storage.

spec.title: Server and GPU Power
spec.description: Total power delivered to the server running vLLM.

spec.title: GPU Activity
spec.description: The activity factor of the CUs and UMC in the GPU. This is given as a percentage of total compute power available.

spec.title: VRAM Utilization
spec.description: The amount of VRAM currently in use.

spec.title: KV Cache Storage Bandwidth
spec.description: The read and write bandwidth into and out of the AIC KV Cache Storage.

spec.title: LMCache Store and Retrieve Requests
spec.description: The total number of LMCache Store and Retrieve requests.

spec.title: Token Rate by Source
spec.description: The tokens per second from compute, local CPU cache and AIC cache.

spec.title: AIC KV Cache Block File Count
spec.description: The total count of KV Cache Blocks on the AIC storage device.

spec.title: AIC Free Capacity
spec.description: The capacity remaining on the ROCm AIC storage system.

spec.title: KV Cache Block Hit Statistics
spec.description: Time-based statistics on the AIC KV Cache Blocks and the number of times they have been "hit" as in retrieved by the KV Block Manager.

spec.title: RDMA Bandwidth to AIC Storage
spec.description: The RDMA transmit and receive bandwidth to and from the AIC storage backend.

spec.title: TPOT
spec.description: Average time between output tokens

spec.title: vLLM - AIC Hit Ratio
spec.description: External prefix cache (LMCache / KV connector) hit ratio from vllm:external_prefix_cache_* counters.

spec.title: Output Tokens per Second
spec.description: The average output tokens per second.

spec.title: NFS Server Bandwidth
spec.description: The bandwidth of read and write traffic to/from the NFS mount(s) on a system.

spec.title: NFS Client Bandwidth
spec.description: The NFS throughput as measured on the NFS client(s) via the nfsiostat tool.

spec.title: ROCm Version
spec.description: The version of ROCm running on the given node(s).

spec.title: Online GPUs
spec.description: The GPUs that are currently online across the cluster, broken out by server.

spec.title: Time to First Token
spec.description: Time-to-first-token latency from vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket; p50 and p99 quantiles over $__rate_interval.

spec.title: ROCm(tm) AMD Infinity Context Dashboard

spec.name: instance
spec.label: Server Instance
spec.description: The server instance (node) that you wish to display metrics for.

spec.name: model
spec.label: LLM Model
spec.description: The LLM model in use. Note this is only appropriate for certain panels and metrics on this dashboard.

spec.name: blkdevice
spec.label: Block Device
spec.description: The specific block device (or devices) you want to visualize in a certain panels.

spec.name: gpu_id
spec.label: GPU ID
spec.description: The gpu_id as given by rocm-smi on the target node.
